meta.title: Sports Orthopedics | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko — Shoulder & Knee Surgeon
meta.description: Sports injuries — from diagnosis and treatment to prevention and return to routine. Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko, shoulder & knee surgeon with 37 years of experience, specializes in sports injuries and minimally invasive arthroscopic surgery.

injuries.title: Sports injuries worth knowing about
injuries.subtitle: Four of the most common injuries among athletes — and not only. Click any injury for detailed information on diagnosis and treatment.

meniscus.title: Meniscus tear
meniscus.description: Pain on the side of the knee after a run, or a "click" during a sudden turn in a game? A meniscus tear is one of the most common knee injuries — and does not always require surgery.

acl.title: Knee ligament injury
acl.description: An awkward landing, the knee twists, sharp pain and immediate swelling — the classic picture of an anterior cruciate ligament tear, a significant injury that calls for professional evaluation.

shoulderDislocation.title: Shoulder dislocation
shoulderDislocation.description: A dislocated shoulder — in sport or at work — is a significant joint injury. The right treatment approach determines your chances of returning to your previous level of activity.

ankleSprain.title: Ankle sprain
ankleSprain.description: Twisting your foot while running or playing — one of the most common injuries in orthopedics. Most cases are treated conservatively, but chronic instability may require surgery.
